17118505.name: 5-Button Pico (Living Room)
17118505.notes: 5-button dimmer Pico. Buttons: ON(0x02), FAV(0x03), OFF(0x04), RAISE(0x05), LOWER(0x06). Works with level commands. Directly paired to dimmer.

084b1ebb.name: Scene Pico (Hallway)
084b1ebb.notes: 4-button scene Pico (Bright/Entertain/Relax/Off). Uses button codes 0x08-0x0B. Paired to Caseta Bridge which relays to hallway lights.

04d0b591.name: Caseta Smart Bridge
04d0b591.notes: Main Caseta bridge. Receives Pico commands and relays to devices. Device ID confirmed from label.

002c90af.name: Dimmer (unknown location)
002c90af.notes: Diva RF dimmer. This was the device we successfully sent level commands to.

cc110001.name: ESP32 CC1101 Transmitter
cc110001.notes: Our custom transmitter. Unique device ID for pairing attempts.

8ceffe36.name: Hallway Dimmer (probable)
8ceffe36.notes: Appeared in captures responding to Scene Pico 084b1ebb commands with 0x9B/0x9F packets. Likely one of the hallway dimmers. Raw bytes: 8C EF FE 36

6f902c21.name: Dimmer (physical toggle test)
6f902c21.notes: Captured sending LEVEL_83 packets when physically toggled. Raw bytes: 6F 90 2C 21
